title: Rei's Minimap b1.7.3 Fabric
description: A Port of Rei's Minimap to OrnitheMC And StationAPI
body:
A Port Of [ReiFNSK's Minimap Mod](https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/1275219-jul-08-reis-minimap-v3-4_01) (Based on v3.0_01 and Formerly based on v1.8) to [Ornithe ModLoader](https://ornithemc.net/) and [Babric](https://babric.github.io/)

Require [Ornithe Standard Libraries](https://modrinth.com/mod/osl) for Ornithe

Require [StationAPI](https://modrinth.com/mod/stationapi) for Babric

![Screenshot of the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88dd35a8cce59fe0e736a52256b298e4aa811b37.png)

[Check out the v3 port to Risugami's Modloader for b1.7.3 here](https://www.reddit.com/r/GoldenAgeMinecraft/s/fSHPQ9Wk37)
